Judge legend renders with correct labels, role, and color swatches
Legend uses design-system colors: Claude=sage, GPT=gold, Gemini=info
Renders 7 dimension rows with labeled bars
Each dimension row has 3 bars with correct widths and aria-labels
Bar widths are proportional to 0-10 scale
Divergent dimensions have scoreboard__row--divergent class
Divergent rows show badge with spread value
Compounding Value and Novelty & Surprise are marked divergent
Overall score row renders with colored swatches and scores
Section has aria-labelledby linked to scoreboard-heading
Heading h2 has id=scoreboard-heading
Section stays hidden when reviewerBreakdown is empty
Raw HTML ships scoreboard section hidden with display:none
Mobile: no horizontal overflow at 375px viewport
Mobile: bars and labels remain visible
Mobile: bar height reduces to 12px at mobile breakpoint
Heading hierarchy uses h2 inside scoreboard section
Legend format uses capitalized name with lens in parentheses
Unknown model family falls back to neutral other styling
Scoreboard renders when scoringDimensions field is absent
Scoreboard renders judges in judgePanel order
Overall score row uses capitalized model family names

All 43 scoreboard E2E tests pass
